_comment: Copy this to <instance>/config/securoguard.json to customise SecuroGuard. All fields are optional; defaults shown here are the built-in defaults. Numeric values are validated and clamped to safe ranges on load. No secrets or tokens belong in this file.
_monitoredDirectories: Extra instance-RELATIVE directories to scan/monitor beyond mods. Paths escaping the instance are rejected.
_scanLimits: Bounds so a pathological instance cannot make a scan run unbounded. Oversized files are reported as skipped, not silently ignored.
